Our Story
Good Food at
the Marina

Nestled in the picturesque Maritime Quarter of Swansea, The Anchor is a charming destination for a relaxed meal out. Whether you're joining us for a casual lunch, a family dinner or a special occasion, we pride ourselves on delivering exceptional food and genuine hospitality.

Our menu spans fresh pizza cooked to perfection, pasta, seafood, grills and light bites — there's truly something for everyone. Every dish is prepared with care from quality ingredients.

Ask for Huseyin when you arrive — his warm welcome and exceptional hospitality are what keep our guests coming back time and again.

Traditional Oven Pizza
Fresh Pasta, Seafood & Grills
Swansea Marina — Beautiful Setting
Perfect for Casual Dining & Special Occasions
